name: ai-agnet
description: Production-grade, multi-agent QA system that autonomously generates, runs, and debugs E2E tests. Works with **any ticket system** (Jira, GitHub Issues, Azure DevOps, Linear, ServiceNow), **any Git provider** (GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket), and **any testing framework** (Playwright, Cypress, Selenium, Puppeteer, TestCafe, Appium, Robot Framework). Powered by Claude Code Agent Teams.
